subject: Physics
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Precision and Accuracy
activities: Introduction: Accuracy and Precision are critical factors in the evaluation of measuring equipment. However, both terms are often used
resources: Understanding area is essential for data analysis, particularly in fields like geography, economics, and environmental science
assessment: Check if learners are correctly using the meter rule and measuring tape to measure accurately and precisely
Ask learners questions on how they could use a broken mete ruler or measuring tape to measure lengths.
Activity 3.1.2: vernier calipers/ micrometer screw gauge
In this activity, learners will explore how a vernier calipers can be used to measure internal and external diameter including depths of
hollow objects and how a micrometer screw gauge can measure the thickness of thin objects with accuracy and precision.
